---
title: "Quarto Blog"
subtitle: "Connor Lockhart's Personal and Academic Blog"
description: |
  Welcome to my blog! I am Connor Lockhart, and this is where I share my academic work, music reviews in a series called Synaptic Static, and other random thoughts.
  
  Visit my main website at [conair94.github.io](https://conair94.github.io).
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
